tasks.title: Test Branch Naming Convention
tasks.description: This is a dummy task to test the branch naming convention in our automation scripts
tasks.details: This task is only for testing purposes and will be deleted after testing the automation scripts.
tasks.testStrategy: Create a branch, complete a subtask, and complete the task to verify that the branch naming convention works correctly.

subtasks.title: Test creating a descriptive branch name
subtasks.description: Verify that the branch name includes the task title in a URL-friendly format
subtasks.details: Run the create-task-branch.sh script and verify that the branch name includes the task title.

subtasks.title: Test completing a subtask
subtasks.description: Verify that subtask completion works correctly with the new branch naming convention
subtasks.details: Run the complete-subtask.sh script and verify that it finds and updates the correct branch.
